channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Woman charged with terrorism offences after returning to Australia from Syria
item.description: A 32-year-old Australian woman, believed to be Janai Safar, has been charged with terrorism-related offences after arriving in Sydney from overseas. Australian Federal Police (AFP) officers removed he...

item.title: Man Arrested Near Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor's Home Following Intimidating Incident
item.description: A man has been apprehended on suspicion of a public order offence and possession of an offensive weapon close to the residence of Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor in Norfolk. Norfolk Police responded to rep...

item.title: Nigeria’s strategic response to xenophobia in South Africa and opportunities for economic leadership
item.description: The article argues that recent xenophobic violence in South Africa targeting African migrants, particularly Nigerians, should push Nigeria to respond with strategic leadership rather than only condemn...

item.title: Key outcomes from South Africa’s latest cabinet meeting: economy, health, and local governance updates
item.description: Government has outlined several important decisions following the latest cabinet meeting chaired by President Cyril Ramaphosa and Deputy President Paul Mashatile. The discussions covered a wide range ...

item.title: The challenge of Nigeria’s ineffective opposition and the need for clear policies
item.description: As Nigeria dey prepare for the next general elections, e clear say di opposition never get serious plan at all. Instead of presenting solid ideas wey fit challenge government policies, dem dey move fr...

item.title: Five-Year-Old Travis Wanjohi Found Dead Near Ragati River in Nyeri After 15 Days Missing
item.description: In Nyeri County, Kenyans are mourning the tragic death of five-year-old Travis Wanjohi, who was found dead near River Ragati after being missing for 15 days. The young boy disappeared while playing ne...

item.title: Franco Mabanta’s political ties to Duterte and Marcos camps amid extortion case
item.description: Franco Mabanta, a social media strategist and founder of Peanut Gallery Media Network (PGMN), was arrested by the National Bureau of Investigation (NBI) on May 5, 2026, for alleged extortion involving...

item.title: Rwanda to Lead AI Roundtable at Africa Forward Summit in Nairobi
item.description: Rwanda is set to co-chair a high-level roundtable on artificial intelligence (AI) at the Africa Forward Summit happening in Nairobi on May 11-12, 2026. The summit, jointly organised by France and Keny...

item.title: New Brunswick man receives life sentences for 2019 murders of elderly couple
item.description: In New Brunswick, Janson Bryan Baker has been sentenced to two concurrent life terms without parole for 25 years following his conviction for the first-degree murders of Bernard Saulnier, 78, and Rose...

item.title: Training Ground Fight Between Valverde and Tchouameni Causes Injury and Internal Crisis at Real Madrid
item.description: Wahala don show for inside Real Madrid camp as tension between Federico Valverde and Aurelien Tchouameni don boil over into serious fight during training. According to reports, the two midfielders fir...

item.title: Australia's ODI Series in Pakistan Scheduled During IPL Playoffs, Some Players Likely to Miss Matches
item.description: Australia's upcoming three-match ODI series in Pakistan is set to overlap with the Indian Premier League playoffs, creating potential player availability challenges for the national team. The matches ...

item.title: James Holder jailed for eight years after rape conviction
item.description: James Holder, co-founder of the fashion brand Superdry, has been jailed for eight years after being found guilty of raping a woman following a night out in Cheltenham. The court heard that Holder, 54,...

item.title: Hantavirus outbreak on cruise ship prompts global passenger tracing and precautionary response
item.description: Health authorities across several countries are working to trace dozens of passengers who disembarked from the cruise ship MV Hondius before a hantavirus outbreak was identified, in an effort to limit...

item.title: Ryan Blaney Secures Multi-Year Future with Team Penske
item.description: Ryan Blaney, the 32-year-old former Nascar Cup Series champion, has officially signed a multi-year extension to remain behind the wheel of the No 12 Team Penske Ford. Blaney, who has been a full-time ...

item.title: Experts say hantavirus outbreak on cruise ship is unlikely to become a global pandemic
item.description: Health experts are closely monitoring a small outbreak of hantavirus linked to a Dutch cruise ship travelling off the West African coast, but they stress that it is highly unlikely to develop into a g...

item.title: Manny Pacquiao to introduce Maharlika Pilipinas Pickleball Tour
item.description: Boxing icon and former senator Manny Pacquiao is preparing to expand his involvement in sports by launching a new professional pickleball league in the Philippines. The planned league, reportedly call...

item.title: Doctor urges New Brunswick to adopt Health Canada clean water standards more quickly
item.description: A physician with an environmental advocacy background, Dr. Chris Arsenault, has urged New Brunswick to update its clean water regulations more promptly in line with Health Canada guidelines. Speaking ...

item.title: Senator Barau Submits Nomination Forms for 2027 Senate Election
item.description: On Thursday, 7th May 2026, Senator Barau I. Jibrin, wey be Deputy President of the Senate, submit him Expression of Interest and Nomination forms for the 2027 Senate elections. Di submission happen at...

item.title: BC Conservative Party Leadership Debate Scheduled for May 9
item.description: Global BC will host a live BC Conservative Party leadership debate on Saturday, May 9, from 4:30 p.m. to 6 p.m., without commercial interruptions. The debate will be moderated by Ben O’Hara Byrne, Glo...

item.title: Instagram Removes Millions of Fake and Inactive Followers from Celebrity Accounts
item.description: Na so Instagram launch one major AI-driven clean-up wey dem dey call 'The Great Purge of 2026'. On May 6, 2026, millions of ghost accounts, bots, and fake followers just disappear from the platform wo...
